author: @misahayase8854
text:
Some streamers already have played it and made videos (none  I really know or follow) 

all titan fall devs had to make is titan fall 3 clone with meka and pilot / infantry, maybe even go a steam punk / victorian age angle (something like Clair Obscur Expedition 33 did with classic France / Paris) since they don't own the IP or go with a space / future type game like Starcraft. THe problem is HIgh Guard looks like  paladins meets concord, and both games kinda failed , so . .. . but actually it think its over watch meets mordhau meets apex / fortnite meets concord meets paladins. 

stylosa is cool, i used to follow him when I was into overwatch (left cuz 2 wasn't a true sequel and the BLizzard scandal); his reveal on the trophy system actually reveals game play, classes etc . .  . it is a hero shooter that has BF 6 type classes melded with Ovewatch classes (support, assault, destruction, recon, defense etc) and it has resources to collect / loot and market place you can buy stuff, there are legendary weapons, there are some base set up / and attack / defense . . . apparently lots of diff types of walls for defense to take down. could be like how overwatch was fps meets moba but this could be tower defense base building / hero shooter meets FPS ?

author: @ForemostExpert
text:
One day, Papa Jeremy went out for a pack of cigarettes.  4 years later, he showed up like nothing ever happened.
Dopey.  Developers can’t just make Titanfall 3.  The publisher, that OWNS the IP has to give them the green light.  For all we know, these people might have fought to make TF3, only to have their pitch rejected.  If that’s your big brained reason for being butthurt, get the fuck over it.  Like other sane, well adjusted people, I didn’t take it personal.  I don’t have a weird parasocial relationship with a bunch of devs.  I just thought the game looked lame and generic.  You’re putting too much emotional investment into this shit.
